final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a product launch campaign featuring 长安起源Q06.

Style/medium: needs a cinematic, visually striking presentation-cover aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a dominant hero background image with title and subtitle overlaid
Subject: must include 长安起源Q06 as the hero subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a grand, immersive backdrop that feels translucent and awe-inspiring — exact scene treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, high-impact atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with 长安 brand tonality — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sense of depth and translucency in the background — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06" (primary title, large), "9月上市" (subtitle, secondary)
Constraints: must preserve PPT cover proportions (16:9 landscape), title and subtitle must be legible over background
Avoid:
